image:image.image:title: Muhammad Hamza — Software Engineer from Peshawar, Pakistan
image:image.image:caption: Muhammad Hamza, Software Engineer, Main Developer of Quizior, Co-Founder at Solvia Codes, Co-Lead at Nexior. Based in Peshawar, Pakistan.

image:image.image:title: QuizAura — AI-Powered Quiz System by Muhammad Hamza
image:image.image:caption: QuizAura: AI-powered multi-tenant quiz platform with real-time invigilation and AI-based subjective grading. Built by Muhammad Hamza.

image:image.image:title: Terminal Chatbot — AI CLI Tool by Muhammad Hamza
image:image.image:caption: Terminal Chatbot using Google Gemini 1.5 Flash, built by Muhammad Hamza, Software Engineer.

image:image.image:title: AI UI/UX Feedback System by Muhammad Hamza
image:image.image:caption: Multi-agent AI design auditor powered by Gemini 2.5 Flash. Built by Muhammad Hamza.
